title: AI_OS Pi Robot Helper Voice/Audio Rule
description: A routing rule mapping an alert event class to a preview presentation (display/voice/led/audio_tone) on the robot helper. preview_only is always true: rules describe what WOULD be presented. No real TTS, audio playback, or hardware actuation occurs from this contract.

event_type.description: Alert class this rule matches. Should be one of the aios_alert_event.event_type values, or '*' for default.

severity_threshold.description: Minimum severity that activates this rule.

wake_worthy.description: Whether matching alerts may escalate to a wake-worthy presentation.

start.description: Local HH:MM start of quiet hours.

end.description: Local HH:MM end of quiet hours.

volume_profile.description: Preview-only intended loudness; no audio is produced.

dark_room_brightness.description: Intended display brightness percent for dark-room operation.

message_template.description: Text template for the announcement. Text only; never spoken by real TTS in this model.
